name: Payment 1 Loans - Albuquerque
description_short: Payment 1 Financial offers personal installment loans and title loans in Albuquerque, NM, with same-day funding and flexible payment terms for emergencies and expenses.
description_long:
Payment 1 Financial has operated in Albuquerque, New Mexico since April 2008, providing personal and title loan services to local residents. The company is based at 6125 Montgomery Blvd. NE #4 and maintains extended business hours (Mon-Fri 9 AM–6 PM, Sat 9 AM–1 PM) to accommodate working customers.

The company offers two primary loan products: personal installment loans for unplanned expenses, home repairs, and emergencies, and title loans that allow borrowers to use their vehicle as collateral while retaining driving privileges. Personal loans are marketed as having competitive rates, flexible payment options, and a fast approval process. Title loans are positioned as a way to unlock vehicle equity quickly and build credit. Both products feature same-day or immediate funding via check or debit card deposit once documents are signed.

Payment 1 distinguishes itself through multiple application channels (in-person, phone, and online), rapid underwriting, and a streamlined four-step process from application to funding. The company emphasizes customer service with a 4.9/5 star rating from 50,000+ reviews and 5/5 stars from 6,988 verified reviews across Google, Facebook, and other platforms. They advertise credit-building benefits and highlight their ability to work with customers who may have credit challenges.

A critical caveat: the website does not disclose APR, interest rates, fees, or loan terms, making it impossible to assess affordability against alternatives. While positioned as an emergency lender, the actual cost of borrowing is entirely opaque. Customers should obtain complete loan terms and APR before committing. The requirement for 5 references and multiple documents suggests underwriting may be more rigorous than typical payday lending, which could mean longer approval times despite "fast" marketing claims.
pros: Same-day funding: Funds available immediately upon document signing via check or debit card deposit
Extended business hours including Saturday morning (9 AM–1 PM) for working customers
Multiple application methods: in-person, phone (505-884-0805), or online without leaving home
Title loans allow vehicle use during repayment while building credit and accessing equity
Transparent four-step process from application through funding clearly outlined on website
High customer satisfaction with 4.9/5 star rating from 50,000+ verified reviews across platforms
Flexible payment options and competitive rates explicitly mentioned for personal loans
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed—complete loan cost is hidden until application
Extensive documentation requirements (5 references, bank statements, SSN/EIN, proof of income/address) may slow approval despite 'fast' claims
Title loans place lien on vehicle title, creating risk if borrower defaults during economic hardship
High review volume (50,000+) claims may reflect multi-state operations, not Albuquerque location specifically
best_for: Employed borrowers with documented income who need $1K–$10K for emergencies and can provide multiple references
Vehicle owners with clear titles seeking quick cash access without selling their car
Borrowers with credit challenges who want to build payment history through installment loans
diagnosis: Payment 1 is best for employed borrowers with documented income who own a vehicle outright or need emergency personal credit and can provide extensive documentation. The critical caveat is that APR and total cost of borrowing are completely absent from the website—applicants must contact the company directly to learn actual rates and fees before committing, as the lack of price transparency makes cost comparison impossible.
services: Personal installment loans for emergencies and unplanned expenses
Title loans using vehicle equity as collateral
Online loan application without in-person visit requirement
In-person loan processing at Albuquerque, NM branch location
Same-day or immediate funding via check or debit card deposit
Vehicle appraisal and title lien placement for title loans
Credit-building installment loan products with flexible payment schedules
State lien filing and title management throughout loan term
Loan document generation and security agreements for title loans
